svg.text: Exp14: Open-Ended Factuality vs Selected-Layer Refresh Schedule
Longer generated answers on TruthfulQA questions; quality panels use the saved reference-bank proxy metrics.
Higher means the answer matches true references more than false references.
Best token-overlap F1 against any true reference answer.
Fraction of questions where true-reference overlap beats false-reference overlap.
How often the decoder changes its selected correction layer during the answer.
How often the carried layer still matches the step-local best layer.
